user.title: Add Etherlighter device
user.description: Enter the UniFi switch SSH credentials from Device Authentication.

reconfigure.title: Reconfigure Etherlighter device
reconfigure.description: Update the UniFi switch SSH connection details.

reauth_confirm.title: Re-authenticate Etherlighter device
reauth_confirm.description: Confirm the UniFi switch SSH credentials and trust the current SSH host key.

error.cannot_connect: Could not connect to the device over SSH.
error.host_key_mismatch: The SSH host key changed. Reconfigure only if you trust this device.
error.invalid_auth: The SSH username or password is invalid.

abort.already_configured: This Etherlighter device is already configured.

mode.name: Mode
mode.description: The predefined Etherlighting mode to activate.

start_cycle.name: Start color cycle
start_cycle.description: Start an Etherlighting color cycle animation.

pattern.name: Pattern
pattern.description: Use all for one shared color, or offset for staggered per-port colors.

stop_cycle.name: Stop color cycle
stop_cycle.description: Stop the active Etherlighting color cycle animation.
